title: elytrigia juncea subsp. bessarabica
intro: Elytrigia juncea subsp. bessarabica, also known as Bessarabian downy brome, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elytrigia juncea subsp. bessarabica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used in infusions or added to salves and creams.
